name: Rodion - Lipstick Testing
description:
💄 | "'Cause all these chemicals, dancin' through my veins; They don't kill the cause, they just numb the pain."

Walking through a run-down department store alongside her fellow sinner (Scenario 1) / dear manager (Scenario 2) of Limbus Company, Rodya spots an appealing lipstick box that she just can’t help trying on and testing out on the nearest marking dummy.

sorry this took so long it was honestly pretty easy
